programs.title: Hoarders
programs.desc: Because all the clutter is actually valuable, Forrest and the Hoarders team of experts are pushed to the limit to save Forrest's home, resolve his financial crisis, and make space for Forrest to live.

programs.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Denise is a no-show at Dorit's housewarming party and fails to keep plans with Garcelle twice in one week. The group hops on a private jet to celebrate Erika's Broadway debut.

programs.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programs.desc: The crew heads into its final charter determined to finish strong despite brewing tension. A relationship between two deckhands heats up, leaving one of them questioning their future.

programs.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programs.desc: 50-year-old Sara is rushed to St George's having suffered a thunderclap headache, while 13-year-old Flynn is in Paediatrics having bullseyed a car windscreen when hit while riding his bike.

programs.title: Judge Jerry
programs.desc: Krichelle was saving up money so she could leave the stripper life. She says she loaned her mother, Shaneque, money with the hopes of being paid back.

programs.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programs.desc: Kim devotes her time and energy to helping free Alice Johnson from prison. Meanwhile Khloe stresses about spending her first night away from baby True.
